top_signals.title: Indonesia Advances Export Control Plan Despite Uncertainty
top_signals.summary: Indonesia is pushing ahead with plans to centralize exports of key commodities starting June 1, casting a cloud of regulatory uncertainty over natural resource producers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
